title: Massive Transfusion in Children-2: A Trial Examining Life Threatening Hemorrhage in Children

skipped_criteria: MTP activation for confirmed or suspected active life-threatening traumatic bleeding: no schema field for MTP activation status.
Hypotension for age (<5th percentile): sbp_mmhg cannot be evaluated against age-specific percentile thresholds.
Tachycardia for age (>95th percentile): hr_bpm cannot be evaluated against age-specific percentile thresholds.
At least 2 of 3 bleeding criteria required (hypotension, tachycardia, exam findings): compound multi-field boolean logic cannot be expressed in the schema.

Traumatic injury with exam findings consistent with severe bleeding (e.g., penetrating injury, hemothorax, distended abdomen, amputation): requires clinical exam findings not available as schema fields.

Devastating TBI not expected to survive (e.g., transhemispheric GSW with herniation, GCS 3 with fixed/dilated pupils): the fixed/dilated pupils and herniation sub-criteria cannot be expressed; GCS=3 alone is only a soft proxy.
MTP activated but no blood products given: no schema field for blood product administration.
ED thoracotomy performed or >5 consecutive minutes of CPR prior to randomization: no schema fields for these procedures.
Known prisoners as defined in protocol: no schema field for prisoner status.
Known ward of the state: no schema field for legal guardianship status.
Isolated hanging or drowning: no schema field for these mechanisms; 'burn' and 'cardiac_arrest' were used as partial proxies for the burn exclusion only.
Previous enrollment in MATIC-2: no schema field for prior trial enrollment.
Prior study opt-out with bracelet: no schema field for opt-out status.
Prehospital or pre-enrollment use of TXA (TXA/Placebo domain): no schema field for prior TXA administration.
Greater than 3 hours since time of injury (TXA/Placebo domain): no schema field for time since injury.
History of seizure after the injury event (TXA/Placebo domain): no schema field for post-injury seizure history.
Known allergy or hypersensitivity to TXA (TXA/Placebo domain): no schema field for drug allergies.
